data.content: Implementation review approved. All quality gates pass: 1920 tests green, typecheck clean, lint 0 errors. Stale settings feature is correctly implemented with detection (inspectStaleSettingsKeys), cleanup (cleanStaleSettingsKeys), doctor integration (checkStaleSettingsKeys), and applyFix handler. Test coverage is comprehensive across settings.test.ts, doctor.test.ts, and doctor-applyfix.test.ts.
